title: derris nitida
intro: Derris nitida, also known as the "yellow heart" or "derris," is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Derris nitida include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
